- Agent file path: `agents/contenders/<handle>.py`

- [ ] I ran:
  - `python -m trajectly run specs/challenges/*.agent.yaml --project-root .`
- [ ] If a failure happened, I also ran:
  - `python -m trajectly repro`
  - `python -m trajectly shrink`
